nodes.standard_name: Aryan Nations Sadistic Souls Motorcycle Club
nodes.original_text_name: Aryan Nations Sadistic Souls Motorcycle Club
nodes.context: White supremacist outlaw motorcycle club founded in 2010, acts as militant arm of Aryan Nations.
Racist organization mentioned as part of a coalition.
Racist organization mentioned as part of a coalition.

edges.source: Aryan Nations Sadistic Souls Motorcycle Club
edges.evidence_quote: According to their official website, the club claims to be the "militant arm" of Aryan Nations.
edges.context: SSMC claims to be the militant arm of Aryan Nations.

edges.source: Aryan Nations Sadistic Souls Motorcycle Club
edges.evidence_quote: In July 2012, SSMC formally merged with Aryan Nations.
edges.context: SSMC formally merged with Aryan Nations in July 2012.

edges.source: Aryan Nations Sadistic Souls Motorcycle Club
edges.evidence_quote: Their club's motto, "The Black & Silver Solution"', is the phrase given to represent a coalition of several racist organizations with the United Klans of America and The Creativity Movement.
edges.context: SSMC is part of a coalition with United Klans of America.

edges.source: Aryan Nations Sadistic Souls Motorcycle Club
edges.evidence_quote: Their club's motto, "The Black & Silver Solution"', is the phrase given to represent a coalition of several racist organizations with the United Klans of America and The Creativity Movement.
edges.context: SSMC is part of a coalition with The Creativity Movement.
